entity_types.name: Client
entity_types.description: A business customer (cafe, restaurant, hotel or corporate office) buying coffee equipment and consumables from the distributor.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Client company name, useful for semantic search.

properties.name: segment
properties.description: Account tier, e.g. VIP, Standard or New.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Account status, e.g. active or churned.

entity_types.name: Contact
entity_types.description: A person at a client company who places orders or corresponds with the distributor.

properties.name: position
properties.description: Job title / role at the client.

entity_types.name: Manager
entity_types.description: A sales / account manager employed by the distributor who owns client relationships.

properties.name: role
properties.description: Role title, e.g. sales manager or key account manager.

entity_types.name: Region
entity_types.description: Geographic region or city where a client is located.

entity_types.name: Industry
entity_types.description: Vertical / business type a client operates in, e.g. cafe, restaurant, hotel, office or coffee-shop chain.

entity_types.name: ProductCategory
entity_types.description: Product category in the distributor's catalog, e.g. machines, grinders, beans, dairy/syrups or consumables.

entity_types.name: Supplier
entity_types.description: An upstream manufacturer or vendor the distributor sources products from.

entity_types.name: Product
entity_types.description: A SKU in the distributor's catalog: coffee machine, grinder, beans, dairy/syrup or consumable.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Product display name, useful for semantic search.

properties.name: unit
properties.description: Unit of sale, e.g. шт, уп., л, кг.

properties.name: unit_price
properties.description: List price per unit in KZT.

properties.name: cost_price
properties.description: Cost of goods per unit in KZT.

properties.name: margin_pct
properties.description: Derived gross margin percentage: (unit_price - cost_price) / unit_price.

entity_types.name: Warehouse
entity_types.description: A distributor warehouse that stocks products and fulfills shipments.

properties.name: city
properties.description: City the warehouse is located in.

entity_types.name: StockLevel
entity_types.description: Derived inventory record for one product at one warehouse.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Primary key. Composite of product and warehouse.

properties.name: reorder_point
properties.description: Quantity threshold below which restocking is triggered.

properties.name: low_stock
properties.description: Derived flag: quantity is at or below reorder_point.

entity_types.name: Order
entity_types.description: A sales order placed by a client.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Order status, e.g. processing or delivered.

properties.name: total_amount
properties.description: Derived total order value, sum of its order lines.

entity_types.name: OrderLine
entity_types.description: A single product line item within an order.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Primary key. Order id plus line index.

properties.name: unit_price
properties.description: Price per unit at order time.

entity_types.name: Invoice
entity_types.description: A financial invoice billed for an order.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Invoice status: paid, pending or overdue.

properties.name: days_overdue
properties.description: Derived number of days past due_date when unpaid.

entity_types.name: Payment
entity_types.description: A payment received against an invoice.

properties.name: method
properties.description: Payment method, e.g. bank_transfer, card or cash.

entity_types.name: Shipment
entity_types.description: A logistics shipment fulfilling an order from a warehouse.

properties.name: ship_date
properties.description: Date the shipment left the warehouse.

properties.name: promised_date
properties.description: Delivery date promised to the client.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Shipment status: in_transit, delivered or delayed.

entity_types.name: Carrier
entity_types.description: A third-party logistics carrier used to deliver shipments.

entity_types.name: Correspondence
entity_types.description: A single email or chat message exchanged between a client contact and a manager, sourced from the mailbox / CRM timeline.

properties.name: body
properties.description: Full message text, embedded for semantic search.

properties.name: sentiment
properties.description: Sentiment tag: positive, neutral or negative.

entity_types.name: Topic
entity_types.description: A normalized topic/intent tag applied to correspondence, e.g. delivery delay, quality complaint or discount request.

entity_types.name: RiskSignal
entity_types.description: A derived negative business signal about a client, computed from invoices, shipments and correspondence, with an explainable evidence trail.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Primary key. Client id plus signal type.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Signal name, e.g. ChurnRisk, PaymentRisk, DeliveryRisk or QualityRisk.

properties.name: description
properties.description: Human-readable explanation of why the signal fired.

properties.name: severity
properties.description: Severity score used for ranking / prioritization.

entity_types.name: OpportunitySignal
entity_types.description: A derived positive business signal about a client, computed from correspondence and order history, with an explainable evidence trail.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Primary key. Client id plus signal type.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Signal name, e.g. ExpansionReady, RenewalOpportunity or LoyalAdvocate.

properties.name: description
properties.description: Human-readable explanation of why the signal fired.

properties.name: weight
properties.description: Weight/priority score used for ranking upsell targets.

relation_types.name: MANAGED_BY
relation_types.description: Direction Client -> Manager. The account manager who owns this client relationship.

relation_types.name: LOCATED_IN
relation_types.description: Direction Client -> Region. The region/city the client is located in.

relation_types.name: IN_INDUSTRY
relation_types.description: Direction Client -> Industry. The vertical the client operates in.

relation_types.name: WORKS_AT
relation_types.description: Direction Contact -> Client. The client company a contact person works at.

relation_types.name: PLACED_ORDER
relation_types.description: Direction Client -> Order. The client that placed an order.

relation_types.name: HANDLED_BY
relation_types.description: Direction Order -> Manager. The manager who processed the order (may differ from the client's account manager).

relation_types.name: HAS_LINE
relation_types.description: Direction Order -> OrderLine. Line items belonging to an order.

relation_types.name: OF_PRODUCT
relation_types.description: Direction OrderLine -> Product, and StockLevel -> Product. The product a line item or stock record refers to.

relation_types.name: IN_CATEGORY
relation_types.description: Direction Product -> ProductCategory. The catalog category a product belongs to.

relation_types.name: SUPPLIED_BY
relation_types.description: Direction Product -> Supplier. The upstream supplier of a product.

relation_types.name: AT_WAREHOUSE
relation_types.description: Direction StockLevel -> Warehouse, and Shipment -> Warehouse. The warehouse a stock record or shipment is associated with.

relation_types.name: HAS_INVOICE
relation_types.description: Direction Order -> Invoice. The invoice billed for an order.

relation_types.name: HAS_PAYMENT
relation_types.description: Direction Invoice -> Payment. A payment received against an invoice.

relation_types.name: HAS_SHIPMENT
relation_types.description: Direction Order -> Shipment. The shipment fulfilling an order.

relation_types.name: SHIPPED_VIA
relation_types.description: Direction Shipment -> Carrier. The logistics carrier used for a shipment.

relation_types.name: FROM_CONTACT
relation_types.description: Direction Correspondence -> Contact. The client contact who sent or received the message.

relation_types.name: ABOUT_CLIENT
relation_types.description: Direction Correspondence -> Client. The client account a message relates to.

relation_types.name: HANDLED_BY_MANAGER
relation_types.description: Direction Correspondence -> Manager. The manager who sent or received the message.

relation_types.name: MENTIONS_TOPIC
relation_types.description: Direction Correspondence -> Topic. Topic(s) detected in a message.

relation_types.name: REFERENCES
relation_types.description: Direction Correspondence -> Order | Invoice. An order or invoice explicitly referenced in a message.

relation_types.name: HAS_RISK_SIGNAL
relation_types.description: Direction Client -> RiskSignal. A derived risk signal attached to a client.

relation_types.name: HAS_OPPORTUNITY_SIGNAL
relation_types.description: Direction Client -> OpportunitySignal. A derived positive signal attached to a client.

relation_types.name: EVIDENCED_BY
relation_types.description: Direction RiskSignal | OpportunitySignal -> Correspondence | Invoice | Shipment. The concrete records that justify a derived signal, making it explainable.
